word: H2552 - חָמַם - châmam - khaw-mam' - Enflame self

sections.paragraph:
Original: חמם

Transliteration: châmam

Phonetic: khaw-mam'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be hot, become warm
    1. (Qal)
      1. to be or grow warm
      2. of passion (figuratively)
    2. (Niphal) to become aroused, inflame oneself with
    3. (Piel) to warm
    4. (Hithpael) to warm oneself

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: TWOT- 677

Part(s) of speech: Verb
